reply: Risk analysis complete. Returned 3 items (including normalized user entries and suggested risks).

risks.suggestedMitigation: Schedule recurring decision checkpoints; assign alternates
risks.suggestedContingency: Elevate to sponsor if decisions stall

risks.suggestedMitigation: Engage security early and pre-book reviews
risks.suggestedContingency: Use phased rollout or temporary controls

risks.suggestedMitigation: Track dependencies with owners and dates
risks.suggestedContingency: De-scope non-critical items to protect launch date
